message:
Update scalar replacement tests for field/config renames and add superblock formation integration tests

Scalar replacement engine integration tests:
- Remove total_size_bytes from FieldLayout construction in tests to match
  updated struct definition (field was removed from the layout struct as
  the engine now computes size internally from the field list).
- Rename confidence_threshold_millionths to min_confidence_millionths in
  ScalarReplacementConfig tests to track the renamed config field, which
  now more precisely conveys that it is a minimum confidence floor rather
  than a generic threshold.
- Change InvalidationReason::EscapesToGlobal to InvalidationReason::DynamicEval
  in the global-escape-denied end-to-end test, aligning with the updated
  enum variant that better describes the invalidation semantics when a
  certificate is denied due to dynamic evaluation exposure.

Superblock formation integration tests (new, 478 lines):
- Add comprehensive integration test suite for superblock formation and
  trace-tree construction, covering: single-block superblocks, multi-block
  linear formation, side-exit recording with polymorphism and type-guard
  reasons, guard insertion (type guards, bound checks, deopt guards),
  formation rejection for cold/unstable profiles, trace-tree construction
  from multiple related superblocks, summary statistics, schema versioning,
  and policy configuration (max blocks, min stability, min IC hit rate).
- Tests use the quickening feedback lattice to build realistic hot profiles
  before feeding them into superblock formation, validating the full
  quickening-to-superblock pipeline.

Update issue tracker metadata.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
